data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

To celebrate the 1st Anniversary, we're giving triple rewards for Lessons, Scrimmages, Bounties, and Commissions for 7 days starting 11/7 (Mon)!

🗓️Period: 11/7 (Mon) 19:00 – 11/14 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
